meta.title: 🐼 Panda World · Global Giant Panda Platform

whySection.title: Why Panda World?
whySection.f1Desc: Watch pandas from Chengdu, Washington, Edinburgh, and Moscow on one page — no more searching around.
whySection.f2Desc: Every panda's identity, personality, fun facts, and family relations — structured and continuously updated.

live.title: 🌍 Global Panda Live
live.description: Aggregating panda livestreams from Chengdu, Washington DC, Edinburgh, Moscow, and beyond. Click a card for details or jump directly to the official stream page.
live.metaDesc: Aggregating global panda livestream sources. Watch giant pandas eat bamboo, play, and go about their daily lives — all in one place.

bamboo.subtitle: From 8 million years of evolution to diet, reproduction, and conservation — everything about the world's most beloved animal star.

bamboo.sectionReproSub: Not easy to breed — the panda's parenting secrets

bamboo.sectionHabitatSub: Giant pandas are found only in 6 mountain ranges in China
